rag_rules: Use assign only for implementation-level bindings to existing output features or auxiliary variables
Place guarantees in component type annexes when they relate to component type features
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations, e.g., `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE contracts
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for clear contract expressions
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding only necessary architecture elements
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate annex scope
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `pre()` for temporal recurrence in stateful equations
Use `if ... then ... else` for branching logic in AGREE
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not use unresolved identifiers in AGREE contracts
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics about unresolved references to 'kinematicLinearization'
AGREE validator diagnostics about assignment statements in component implementations
